summary: Tested Year-in-Books feature end-to-end. Backend: 21/21 pytest cases pass (year payload, validation, email POST, auth gate, regression). Re-ran existing test_digest.py + test_new_features.py = 43/43 pass — confirms include_router move did NOT break any previously-working endpoint. Frontend: 14/14 UI checks pass (empty state, prev/next navigation, next-year hidden on currentYear, has_data sections rendered, email-year-recap POST fires correctly, /library/stats CTA hidden when empty and visible+navigates when has data).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 2983 — app.include_router(api_router) was moved AGAIN to AFTER the year-in-books module. Verified regression: /api/auth/me, /api/auth/register, /api/auth/login, /api/auth/logout, /api/user/digest-settings, /api/user/digest-preview, /api/books, /api/stats/overview, /api/stats/detailed, /api/authors, /api/series, /api/books/bulk/{metadata,move,delete} all return expected statuses.

Spec said validation '1800 -> 400, 2999 -> 400'; actual implementation is `year < 1900 or year > 2200`. The behaviour matches the spec for 1800/2999 (both out of range), but main agent should note the effective bounds are 1900..2200, not 1800..2999.

Jan-1 year-in-books send block is wired into _digest_tick at server.py:2622 — code path exists; runtime trigger is calendar-based and cannot be exercised in preview, but call site, function definition (_send_year_email), and template builder (_build_year_payload) are all reachable and POST /api/year-in-books/{year}/email returns delivered=false logged=true as expected when RESEND_API_KEY is empty.

year-achievements section is rendered when has_data=true but its inner items are conditionally hidden when no achievements are unlocked (single-book seed -> visible=False). Acceptable per spec 'optional ... year-achievements'.

server.py is now 3,007 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Year-in-books module (lines 2,649–2,980) is another natural split candidate (backend/services/year_in_books.py + backend/routers/year_in_books.py). Non-blocking.
Pre-existing lint warnings F841/F541 noted by main agent — not introduced by this iteration, still present.
test_credentials: Created fresh users per test run via POST /api/auth/register (e.g. test_yib_<rand>@example.com / hunter2pw) and seeded direct Mongo users with Bearer tokens for pytest. All cleaned up in fixture teardown.
seed_data_creation: Pytest fixture seed_user + seeded_book: 1 user, 1 user_session, 1 book (progress=0.99, last_opened_at=2025-06-15, author=Test Author, fandom=Harry Potter), 1 reading_activity row (2025-06-15). All deleted in teardown. Playwright test: registered + Mongo-seeded book/activity for has_data flow, cleaned up at end of script.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Year-in-Books fully working. Re-test cmd: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://genre-sort.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_year_in_books.py -v` (21 cases). For UI: register fresh user, navigate /library/year/2025 (empty state -> 'No reading recorded in 2025' + [data-testid=year-in-books-title] containing '2025'). To exercise has_data path: insert into Mongo `books` (progress_percent=0.99, last_opened_at='2025-06-15T..', user_id=<uid>) and `reading_activity` (date='2025-06-15', book_ids=[bid]). Then verify sections year-headline-stats / year-monthly-chart / year-top-fandoms / year-top-authors / year-bookends and click [data-testid=email-year-recap] (expect 200 + delivered=false logged=true). On /library/stats, [data-testid=open-year-in-books] is hidden when books_total==0 and visible+navigates to /library/year/{currentYear} when has books.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — feature works as specified, no bugs found.
